_comment: MCP servers this plugin needs; install-plugin merges these into the project's MCP config.
'aisee' is the AISee server's own MCP endpoint (streamable HTTP, consumer capabilities only).
The URL below is a PLACEHOLDER: at install time, replace it with the answered aisee_server
resource + '/mcp' (e.g. http://gpu-host:8484/mcp). If a consumer token was answered (not 'none'),
'playwright' is the web capture driver (also shipped in the framework MCP template; merge is idempotent).
